steps.title: Track Bennett's revisions
steps.content: Bennett's story keeps changing. In one version, he and the captain were the only people not ill; in another, it was he and the second mate; in another, it was he and one other man; finally, it was only Bennett.

steps.title: Reject unsupported readings
steps.content: The changing details are not about Bennett spending time with passengers or struggling to remember a first trip. They also do not show worry about the current boat trip. The repeated point is self-flattering: every version keeps Bennett among the people who were not ill, even as the companion changes or disappears. Choice C captures both the shifting details and the bragging about wellness. The answer is C.
